debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

proof:
by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩
failed_attempts:
by
  rcases h with ⟨f, h1, h2⟩
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B h
    apply set_ext; intro x
    constructor <;> intro hx
    · have : f x ∈ image f B := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
      rwa [←h1 heq]
    · have : f x ∈ image f A := h.symm ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
      rwa [←h1 heq]
  · intro B
    exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro hy
      rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      rcases h2 y with ⟨x, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨x, hy, rfl⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B heq
    apply ext; intro x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have : f x ∈ image f B := by rw [←heq]; exists x; exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩ := this
      rw [←hf.1 hfy]; exact hy
    · intro hx
      have : f x ∈ image f A := by rw [heq]; exists x; exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩ := this
      rw [←hf.1 hfy]; exact hy
  · intro B
    exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxy⟩ := hy
      rw [←hxy]; exact hxB
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxy⟩ := hf.2 y
      exists x
      rw [hxy]; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  cases h with f hf
  cases hf with h1 h2
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B heq
    apply Set.ext; intro x
    constructor <;> intro h
    · have : f x ∈ image f B := by rw [←heq]; exists x; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
      cases this with y hy; rw [←h1 hy.2]; exact hy.1
    · have : f x ∈ image f A := by rw [heq]; exists x; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
      cases this with y hy; rw [←h1 hy.2]; exact hy.1
  · intro B
    exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro h; cases h with x hx; rw [←hx.2]; exact hx.1
    · intro h; cases h2 y with x hx
      exists x; exact ⟨by rw [hx]; exact h, hx⟩

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, hinj, hsurj⟩
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B h; apply Set.ext; intro x
    constructor <;> intro hx
    · obtain ⟨x', h', e⟩ : f x ∈ image f B := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [hinj e] at h'; exact h'
    · obtain ⟨x', h', e⟩ : f x ∈ image f A := by rw [h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [hinj e] at h'; exact h'
  · intro B; exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := hsurj y
      exact ⟨x, hy, rfl⟩
successful_attempts:
by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  obtain ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id h1, image_comp_id h2⟩

match (equinum_iff_inverse_pair U V).mp h with
  | ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ =>
    (equinum_iff_inverse_pair (Set U) (Set V)).mpr
      ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B heq
    apply Set.ext; intro x
    constructor <;> intro hx
    · have h : f x ∈ image f A := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [heq] at h
      obtain ⟨x', hx', e⟩ := h
      rw [hf.1 _ _ e] at hx'; exact hx'
    · have h : f x ∈ image f B := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [← heq] at h
      obtain ⟨x', hx', e⟩ := h
      rw [hf.1 _ _ e] at hx'; exact hx'
  · intro B
    exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro h
      obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := h
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := hf.2 y
      exact ⟨x, hy, rfl⟩

let ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair U V).mp h
  (equinum_iff_inverse_pair (Set U) (Set V)).mpr
    ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id h1, image_comp_id h2⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  match h with
  | ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ =>
    exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h

  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := h
  exists image f, image g
  constructor
  · apply image_comp_id h1
  · apply image_comp_id h2

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, h_inj, h_surj⟩
  exists image f
  constructor
  · intro A B heq; ext x
    have iff_img : ∀ S, x ∈ S ↔ f x ∈ image f S :=
      fun S ↦ ⟨fun h ↦ ⟨x, h, rfl⟩, fun ⟨y, hy, e⟩ ↦ h_inj _ _ e ▸ hy⟩
    rw [iff_img A, heq, ←iff_img B]
  · intro B; exists {x | f x ∈ B}; ext y
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, h, rfl⟩; exact h
    · intro h; obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := h_surj y; exact ⟨x, h, rfl⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  obtain ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := h
  exists image f, image g
  constructor
  · exact image_comp_id h1
  · exact image_comp_id h2

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at *
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  match h with
  | ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ =>
    exists image f, image g
    exact ⟨image_comp_id h1, image_comp_id h2⟩
